title: The Twins.
content:
If one were not blue,
        While the other is red,
    You'd fancy that Su-
        San was Mary instead.

    If one were not red,
        While the other is blue,
    'Twould surely be said,
        That Miss Mary was Sue!
meaning:
Richard Hunter's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Twins."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
